abilities.description:
In your hands, a humble staff might be a deadly weapon. When you make a move to inflict harm with it, choose one [decide before rolling].

  • Make it harder: Mark progress on a hit.
  • Make it finesse: Roll +edge instead of +iron, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} using your staff to disarm, trip, shove, or stun your foe, add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit as your skill unsettles them and seize the advantage.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course}, and score a strong hit, or if you accompany an ally who scores a strong hit on that move, your staff provides support and comfort in your travels; take +1 spirit.
